  • Uses of DuplicateRecordException in in.co.rays.proj4.model

    Methods in in.co.rays.proj4.model that throw DuplicateRecordException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    CollegeModel.add(CollegeBean bean)
    Commits a new College instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
    long
    CourseModel.add(CourseBean bean)
    Commits a new Course instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
    long
    FacultyModel.add(FacultyBean bean)
    Commits a new Faculty instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
    long
    MarksheetModel.add(MarksheetBean bean)
    Commits a new Marksheet instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
    long
    RoleModel.add(RoleBean bean)
    Adds a new Role record to the database after validating that the role name does not already exist.
    long
    StudentModel.add(StudentBean bean)
    Adds a new Student record to the database after verifying that the email ID is unique and resolving the associated college name.
    long
    SubjectModel.add(SubjectBean bean)
    Adds a new Subject record to the database after verifying that the subject name is unique and resolving its dependency details from CourseModel.
    long
    TimetableModel.add(TimetableBean bean)
    Adds a new Timetable record after fetching course and subject details.
    long
    UserModel.add(UserBean bean)
    Adds a new user record.
    long
    UserModel.registerUser(UserBean bean)
    Registers a new user and sends email.
    void
    CollegeModel.update(CollegeBean bean)
    Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent College entity row inside the database engine using its designated primary key.
    void
    CourseModel.update(CourseBean bean)
    Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Course entity row inside the database engine using its designated primary key.
    void
    FacultyModel.update(FacultyBean bean)
    Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Faculty entity row inside the database engine.
    void
    MarksheetModel.update(MarksheetBean bean)
    Updates properties and operational metadata configuration elements for an existing persistent Marksheet entity row inside the database engine.
    void
    RoleModel.update(RoleBean bean)
    Updates an existing Role record in the database after validating for name duplicates.
    void
    StudentModel.update(StudentBean bean)
    Updates an existing Student record in the database.
    void
    SubjectModel.update(SubjectBean bean)
    Updates an existing Subject record in the database and refreshes its course dependency metadata context.
    void
    TimetableModel.update(TimetableBean bean)
    Updates an existing Timetable record.
    void
    UserModel.update(UserBean bean)
    Updates an existing user record.
